'''Babel Senjorg''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] merchant with ties to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorism]]. He worked with the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]] after Ort cured him of a fatal illness. He provided supplies and also aided in the transport of Hoogra-DEn's [[spore bomb]]s to other planets from his home base on [[Pallaxides]]. While delivering one of these spore bombs aboard the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Chalcedony (freighter)|''Chalcedony'']], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] detective accidentally set of spore bomb by accident. Senjorg tried to erase the information from his [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]] connecting his to Hoogra-D'En but was killed when the ship was forced to crash on [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]].
